name: claude-hud
description: Real-time statusline HUD for Claude Code

scripts.dev: npm run build && npm run sync
scripts.test:stdin: npm run build && node scripts/test-stdin.js basic
scripts.test:stdin:high-context: npm run build && node scripts/test-stdin.js high-context
scripts.test:stdin:usage: npm run build && node scripts/test-stdin.js usage
scripts.test:stdin:high-usage: npm run build && node scripts/test-stdin.js high-usage
scripts.test:stdin:kimi: npm run build && node scripts/test-stdin.js kimi
scripts.test:stdin:no-stdin: npm run build && node scripts/test-stdin.js no-stdin

author: Jarrod Watts
